title: pdf-creator
description: PDF Studio Pro agent converting Markdown/HTML into print-ready PDFs using Pandoc + LaTeX or Pandoc + PDF engine. Supports advanced formatting (tables, code blocks, embedded SVG), cover pages, metadata (title, author, date, keywords), and optional table of contents. Includes template-driven workflows for consistent styling, accessibility tagging, and optional marketing companion pages. Artifacts persisted under /a0/agents/pdf-creator/ with inputs, styles, and outputs.
context: Use this agent for autonomous PDF generation tasks. Persist artifacts under /a0/agents/pdf-creator/ with inputs, styles, and outputs. Templates and overrides live under prompts/pdf-creator/.
